fx:SIGNAL.ho:DESC: Selector for Training or test
Tensione misurata a valle del contattore
Tensione misurata sommando tutte le celle
0 = Manual Driving, 1 = Acceleration, 2 = Skidpad, 3 = Autocross, 4 = Trackdrive, 5 = EBS Test, 6 = Inspection
1 = ASU_ok
1 = Close Brake release message on DASH
E-Stop bit 0, K2 bit 1, K3 bit 2
Pre-Int bit 6
0 = Manual Driving, 1 = Acceleration, 2 = Skidpad, 3 = Autocross, 4 = Trackdrive, 5 = EBS Test, 6 = Inspection
sync from miracle
inverter active [x, x, x, x, FR, FL, RR, RL]
Cool actuation smart pump derating
Cool actuation smart pump faults
Cool actuation smart pump actual current
Cool actuation smart pump actual temperature
Cool actuation smart pump actual voltage
Cool actuation smart pump actual speed
Cool actuation smart pump actual torque
Temperature of cooling oil provided to the cooling pump
Cool actuation smart pump speed target command
Cool actuation smart pump control mode command
Cool actuation smart pump diagnostic request
